1346.reason: [This should be unaryExp1.getUnaryExp() instead of unaryExp.getUnaryExp(), causing incorrect parsing of the second operand in multiplication/division/modulo operations]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This should be unaryExp1.getUnaryExp() instead of unaryExp.getUnaryExp(), causing incorrect parsing of the second operand in multiplication/division/modulo operations]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly calling getUnaryExp() on the first operand 'unaryExp' instead of the newly created second operand 'unaryExp1', which will cause incorrect parsing and potential infinite recursion]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This should call unaryExp1.getUnaryExp() instead of unaryExp.getUnaryExp(), causing the newly created unaryExp1 to remain uninitialized while re-parsing the same expression]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This should call unaryExp1.getUnaryExp() instead of unaryExp.getUnaryExp(), causing incorrect parsing of the right operand in multiplication/division/modulo operations]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [should call unaryExp1.getUnaryExp() instead of unaryExp.getUnaryExp(), causing incorrect parsing of the second operand in multiplication/division/modulo expressions]
